notice-board.title: Notice Board
notice-board.subtitle: About Nuu
lines: Nuu (нүү) — the verb shatar players use when they make their move.
We are a community of Mongolian builders, breakers, and shippers — scattered across the world, gathered here.
Drop your move on the Discord. Then make the next one.

pavilion.title: Pavilion
pavilion.subtitle: Upcoming events
lines: All RSVP from the events list below the world.

bookshelf.title: Bookshelf
bookshelf.subtitle: Library
lines: Four pieces on the shelf — a shatar primer, diaspora notes, an avatar guide, and a design memo about why this world exists.
More coming. If you have something to add, drop a draft in Discord.

portal.title: Portal
portal.subtitle: Discord
lines: Step through to join the Discord.
First move you make: introduce yourself in #intros.

salon.title: Salon
salon.subtitle: Mirror · clothes · style
lines: Welcome. Try a new look — change skin, hair, fit, or body.
Stored locally for now. Syncs to your profile when Discord login lands.
